---
name: Feature Request
about: Propose a new feature or improvement
labels: enhancement
---

## Summary

A short description of the proposed feature.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? What problem does it solve or what opportunity does it unlock?

## Proposed Implementation

How you think this should work. Include any relevant technical details.

## Affected Components

- [ ] Scanner
- [ ] Researcher / Scoring model
- [ ] Executor
- [ ] Position Monitor / Exit strategy
- [ ] Persistence layer
- [ ] REST API
- [ ] Presets / Settings
